properties.description: Видео-вложение (mp4/mpeg/mov/webm) либо ссылка на YouTube. Доступно только для моделей с supports_video_input=true; источник определяется video_url_mode (any → загрузка в MinIO; youtube_only → внешний URL).
properties.label: Видео

properties.description: HeyGen video generation provider (image-to-video Avatar IV + lipsync) introduced in FR-021
properties.label: HeyGen

properties.description: HeyGen direct API (https://api.heygen.com/v3); introduced in FR-021
properties.label: HeyGen

properties.description: Lipsync generation: video + audio in, re-lipped video out. Introduced in FR-021 with HeyGen Lipsync Precision/Speed.
properties.label: Video Lipsync

properties.description: api.kie.example.invalid text-completion provider (synchronous OpenAI-compatible chat / Anthropic Messages / OpenAI Responses). Introduced in FR-025. Distinct from existing kie_ai which is async task-based for video/image/music.
api.kie.example.invalid (UI grouping label). Used when a text model is configured to route via kie_ai_text. Introduced in FR-025.
Anthropic native Messages API proxied via https://api.api.kie.example.invalid/claude/v1/messages. Used for Claude Opus/Sonnet 4.x on api.kie.example.invalid.

OpenAI Responses API at https://api.api.kie.example.invalid/codex/v1/responses. Used for gpt-5-5 on api.kie.example.invalid (input field, not messages; reasoning.effort low/medium/high/xhigh; streaming events response.output_text.delta).

OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions at https://api.api.kie.example.invalid/<model>/v1/chat/completions. Used for Gemini 3.x families on api.kie.example.invalid (tools.googleSearch for grounding; include_thoughts; reasoning_effort low/high).
